title: fragariastrum kionaeum
intro: Fragariastrum kionaeum, also known as the strawberry agave, is a type of succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fragariastrum kionaeum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared as a salve or ointment for topical application, as well as being incorporated into herbal teas and tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
